name: conductor-orchestrator-superpowers
description: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code with parallel execution, automated quality gates, Board of Directors, and bundled Superpowers skills. Provides 16 agents, 42 skills, 22 commands, and 5 board director roles for structured engineering team workflows.

findings_summary.notes: Well-structured multi-agent orchestration plugin with MIT license. Has a SessionStart hook (hooks/session-start.sh) that reads a SKILL.md file and injects context — behavior is transparent and benign. Hook reads local files using safe bash parameter substitution, no network calls or credential access. Bundles superpowers v4.3.0 (MIT). Scripts directory contains only a setup.sh. No dangerous eval/exec patterns found. Active development (created Feb 2026, 25 forks, 2 open issues). Documentation is thorough with CHANGELOG. Claim of 16 agents / 42 skills / 22 commands is consistent with directory structure (agents/, commands/, skills/ directories present). Minor concern: recently created repo (Feb 2026) with high star count may indicate rapid organic growth or coordinated promotion.
